title: rubus pilifer
intro: Rubus pilifer, also known as the thorny bramble or Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus pilifer include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for various health benefits, and it is also used in traditional cooking and as a food source.
